# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Pull Request Testing

on:
  pull_request_target:

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Run Tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Report Test Results
        uses: actions/github-script@v6
        with:
          script: |
            const { core, github } = require('@actions/core');
            const { context } = github;

            const report = Buffer.from(process.env.TEST_REPORT, 'base64').toString();

            await github.rest.issues.createComment({
              issue_number: context.payload.pull_request.number,
              body: `## Test Report

${report}`,
            });
